users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Operators with access to the clinic system.
users.name: Name
users.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters
users.delete_confirm: Soft-delete this user? Active sessions will be revoked.
users.delete_warning: Soft-deletes the user and revokes all active sessions.

inventory.consumption_subtype_picker: Subtype mapping is not supported in this form. Pick a flat check type.
inventory.consumption_dye_unsupported: Selected check type does not support dye.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure clinic operations.

updates.title: App updates
updates.description: Check for a newer version of the desktop app.
updates.current: You are on the latest version.
updates.unsupported: Updates are not available on this build.

settings.unsaved_prompt: You have unsaved changes. Leave without saving?

group_desc.identity: How the clinic appears on receipts and exports.
group_desc.pricing: Cost inputs the money engine uses for new visits.
group_desc.display: How numbers are shown across the app.

desc.clinic_display_name_ar: Arabic name printed on receipts and the daily-close PDF.
desc.clinic_display_name_en: English name printed on receipts and the daily-close PDF.
desc.currency_symbol: Symbol shown next to every money amount.
desc.report_pct: Percentage of the post-doctor-cut price paid to the internal reporting doctor. Applies to days locked from now on.
desc.reporting_doctor_name: Name of the internal doctor who receives the reporting share.
desc.internal_doctor_pct: Share of the price paid to an in-house doctor when no per-check rate is set.
desc.idle_lock_minutes: Lock the session automatically after this many minutes of inactivity.
desc.arabic_numerals: Render every number app-wide in Arabic-Indic digits.
desc.thermal_width: Character columns your thermal printer supports per line.
desc.thermal_printer_name: Exact printer name as the operating system reports it.

error.pct: Enter a whole number from 0 to 100.

connection.title: Sync server
connection.desc: The server this device syncs and signs in against.
connection.hint: Use the address your clinic was given. Changing it re-pins the new server's security key.
connection.invalid: Enter a full http:// or https:// address.
connection.confirm_warning: Point this device at a different sync server? It will trust that server for sign-in and send all data there. Only do this if you were told to.

mandoubs.title: Representatives
mandoubs.subtitle: Representatives who refer patients alongside a doctor.
mandoubs.name: Name
